positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a nocturnal forest scene, featuring three interconnected elements: a stylized crescent moon, a trio of gently curved, ethereal moths, and delicate stylized branches adorned with bioluminescent glowing berries. The overall aesthetic should be clean, symmetric, and highly contrasted, using a limited color palette of deep indigo, soft teal, and glowing lime green accents against a solid, cream-colored background. The composition must be centralized and suitable for a chest print, emphasizing negative space and clean silhouettes. Style should mimic high-end modern botanical etching meets Japanese woodblock print. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, vector graphics quality, centered, printable composition.
